review: Mainly use it in person. This app does Force you to tip the driver! it does this by making it so that when you manually set the tip to be $0.00 the app freezes up, which I'm pretty sure is illegal. however if you just go in person, your basically getting free meals.

when placing order you don't have the option to pay when you show up. you have to pay first. used to work as ,make order on app ,cool order placed got code , drive to mc dons , give code and pay at window, why is this not an option. is there an update coming to fix this
